Package org.eventb.core

Interface ISCPredicateElement

All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IElementManipulation, IInternalElement, IParent, IPredicateElement, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable
All Known Subinterfaces:
IPOPredicate, ISCAxiom, ISCGuard, ISCInvariant, ISCWitness
All Known Implementing Classes:
POPredicate, PRStoredPred, SCAxiom, SCGuard, SCInvariant, SCPredicateElement, SCWitness
public interface ISCPredicateElement extends IPredicateElement
Common protocol for Event-B SC elements that contain a predicate.

As this element has been statically checked, the contained predicate parses and type-checks. Thus, it can be manipulated directly as an AST.

Since:
1.0

  • Method Details

    • getPredicateString

      String getPredicateString() throws RodinDBException
      Returns the predicate string contained in this element.
      Specified by:
      getPredicateString in interface IPredicateElement
      Returns:
      the string representation of the predicate of this element
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getPredicate

      Predicate getPredicate(ITypeEnvironment typenv) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the typed predicate contained in this element.

      If a EventBAttributes.SOURCE_ATTRIBUTE is present, it is considered the predicate's origin.

      Parameters:
      typenv - the type environment to use for building the result
      Returns:
      the predicate of this element
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the database, or if the predicate does not parse or type-check
      Since:
      3.0
      See Also:
      • ISCContextRoot.getTypeEnvironment()
      • ISCMachineRoot.getTypeEnvironment()
      • ISCEvent.getTypeEnvironment(ITypeEnvironment)

    • setPredicate

      void setPredicate(Predicate predicate, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Sets the predicate contained in this element.
      Parameters:
      predicate - the predicate to set (must be type-checked)
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database
